creator: krolk@web.de
text:
linux java plugin doesn't work with linux-seamonkey !

I have installed on freeBSD 6.3 from ports: 

linux-sun-jre16 

nspluginwrapper 

linux-seamonkey 

I've tried to create a symlink to the java plugin:

# ln -s /usr/X11R6/linux-sun-jre1.6.0/plugin/i386/ns7/libjavaplugin_oji.so /usr/X11R6/lib/linux-seamonkey/plugins/libjavaplugin_oji.so[/code]


and:

# ln -s /usr/X11R6/linux-sun-jre1.6.0/plugin/i386/ns7/libjavaplugin_oji.so /usr/X11R6/lib/browser_plugins/libjavaplugin_oji.so

but still doesn't work.

How-To-Repeat: install linux-sun-jre16 and create a symlink in the linux browser plugin.
